name: CHAPTER FOUR: The Demon
description:
[UNHOLY] ♱ BETRAYAL ARC — Sedit


Chapter 4 — The Demon
Sedit finds you as soon as you land on Earth. He's different from the Infernals you've heard so much about. Something about him is calming, especially in the careful way he regards humans. Weren't you taught that demons were the bad guys? Somehow, that feels wrong to say.

(Full Series Info)


Concept
A story narrative type of series meant to be experienced in order, but the characters also work as standalone bots! The characters and you, the main character, are all interconnected. An underlying lore and plot get unravelled through each character you meet. Starting from Chapter One is encouraged.

Main Character Info + Backstory
You are a Celestial, dwelling in Empyrea, where heavenly beings like angels reside. In Empyrea, everyone serves The Smiling God. But you, in particular, are considered the most Beloved angel of all. Once taught by the archangel Zerachiel himself, life was peaceful for you. All you knew was to love and serve The Smiling God.

Everything changed the day Zerachiel chose to Fall from grace and become an Infernal, a creature of Sulfyre, where fallen angels become demons and other dark beings. How could an archangel do such a thing? For once, you began to have questions; questions that nobody in Empyrea is willing to answer.

The smallest seed of doubt could change everything. Will you let it?

DISCLAIMER
While I do have everything planned out and will be doing my best to code each bot accordingly, there are no certainties that all the bots will follow my desired plot 100% of the time, nor will they all be guaranteed to know all of the lore. Chances are, they will make up new lore. This is unfortunately out of my control, but it’s fine! As the “main character” feel free to steer them in any direction you wish! The overarching plot can be treated as a guideline.
creator: anticyra
